name: Incident
description: Incident schema from Palo Alto Networks SaaS Security API

description.description: Detailed description of the security incident.

app_id.description: ID of the SaaS application where the incident occurred.

policy_name.description: Name of the policy that triggered the incident.

affected_assets.description: IDs of assets involved in the incident.

affected_users.description: User IDs of users involved in the incident.

assignee_id.description: User ID of the assigned analyst.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the incident was detected.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent update.
